falsification_conditions.condition: The asset price closes above $150,000 (previous 2024 Aug peak)
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A breakout above this level would invalidate the 'bottom' pattern similarity and suggest a bullish reversal, contradicting the HOLD signal.
A blowoff score above 50 indicates extreme market pressure, directly contradicting the current HOLD signal and suggesting a forced move rather than a consolidation phase.

falsification_conditions.condition: Trading volume surges by >200% compared to 30-day average
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such a volume spike would indicate a clear market conviction shift, invalidating the 'unknown' verdict by showing decisive price action contrary to the HOLD signal.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
